TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_aljak_na_mazazangiljan_a_ti_paisi, title = aljak_na_mazazangiljan_a_ti_paisi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/aljak_na_mazazangiljan_a_ti_paisi} }

S.FORM: minamilingan aicu "aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi ", mavan a milimilingan nua sedjerman i iyurupu (Europe) tua tja kakedriyan. a i sangasangasan a vinecikan aicu a milimilingan i tua sinansunatj nua madrusa a kaka a lja grimm (The Brothers Grimm) a minamilingan nua lja grimm (Grimms' Fairy Tales) ka 1812 a caviljan. sinanljavaran aicu a "Sneewittchen" nua i kakaian a djermany. minamilingan sinanzugan ni velanz (Franz J√ľttner) tua aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi (1905)
S.PHON: minami…≠iŇčan ai ¶u "a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi ", mavan a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ô…Č…ôrman i ijurupu (…ôurup…ô) tua ¶a kak…ô…Ėijan. a i saŇčasaŇčasan a vin…ô ¶ikan ai ¶u a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan i tua sinansuna ¶ nua ma…Ėusa a kaka a éa grimm (th…ô bruth…ôrs grimm) a minami…≠iŇčan nua éa grimm (grimms Ē *airj ta…≠…ôs) ka **** a ¶avi éan. sinan éavaran ai ¶u a "sn…ô…ôwitt ¶h…ôn" nua i kakaian a …Č…ôrmanj. minami…≠iŇčan sinanzugan ni v…ô…≠anz (*ranz **ttn…ôr) tua a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi (****)
S.FORM: minamilingan aicu "aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi ", mavan a milimilingan nua sedjerman i iyurupu (Europe) tua tja kakedriyan. a i sangasangasan a vinecikan aicu a milimilingan i tua sinansunatj nua madrusa a kaka a lja grimm (The Brothers Grimm) a minamilingan nua lja grimm (Grimms' Fairy Tales) ka 1812 a caviljan. sinanljavaran aicu a "Sneewittchen" nua i kakaian a djermany. minamilingan sinanzugan ni velanz (Franz J√ľttner) tua aljak na mazazangiljan a ti paisi (1905)
S.PHON: minami…≠iŇčan ai ¶u "a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi ", mavan a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ô…Č…ôrman i ijurupu (…ôurup…ô) tua ¶a kak…ô…Ėijan. a i saŇčasaŇčasan a vin…ô ¶ikan ai ¶u a mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan i tua sinansuna ¶ nua ma…Ėusa a kaka a éa grimm (th…ô bruth…ôrs grimm) a minami…≠iŇčan nua éa grimm (grimms Ē *airj ta…≠…ôs) ka **** a ¶avi éan. sinan éavaran ai ¶u a "sn…ô…ôwitt ¶h…ôn" nua i kakaian a …Č…ôrmanj. minami…≠iŇčan sinanzugan ni v…ô…≠anz (*ranz **ttn…ôr) tua a éak na mazazaŇči éan a ti paisi (****)
